# Examples: agent-analysis skill
This file collects usage examples, CLI invocations, and integration patterns for the agent-analysis skill.
## Example 1: Extract Anchor Lines
- To extract anchor lines from all agent files:
```sh
python scripts/agent_anchor_lines.py
```
## Example 2: Audit Agent Contract Structure
- To audit agent contract structure:
```text
python scripts/agent_line_audit.py
```
## Example 3: Audit Agent Skill References
- To audit agent skill references:
```sh
python scripts/agent_skill_audit.py
```
---
Add more examples as new tools or scripts are integrated with this skill.
